author: sharkello
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Sync your vault with Notion — preserves folder hierarchy, markdown formatting, internal links, metadata, and attachments.

manifest.author: Sharky
manifest.description: Sync your vault with Notion — preserves folder hierarchy, markdown formatting, internal links, metadata, and attachments.
manifest.name: Notion Sync

name: Notion Sync

releases.author: sharkello
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Pass all required obsidianmd ESLint checks for plugin review
- Fix `onOpen`/`onClose` to return `Promise.resolve()` without `async`
- Fix all promise-handling warnings (`no-misused-promises`, `no-floating-promises`)
- Remove unnecessary type assertions
- Fix sentence case in all UI strings
- Remove problematic settings heading
- Fix unsafe `any` member access in error handling

releases.author: sharkello
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.2.0

**Pull new pages from Notion**
Pages created directly in Notion now appear in Obsidian. Use the folder-down button in the sync panel or the command Pull new pages from Notion.

**Status bar**
Live indicator at the bottom of Obsidian: Ready / Syncing... / Synced 3m ago / Sync error.

**File Explorer indicators**
Synced files show a green checkmark. Locally modified files show an orange M — just like git status in VS Code.

**Download images on Pull**
Notion images are downloaded to a local _attachments folder and replaced with Obsidian embeds. Toggle in Settings → Download Images on Pull.

**Progress bar**
Visual progress bar in the sync panel during full vault sync and pull operations.

**Sync History + Rollback**
The history button in the sync panel shows the last 100 push/pull operations. Pull operations include a Rollback button to instantly restore the file to its previous state.
releases.name: 1.2.0 — Pull new pages, status bar, history & more

releases.author: sharkello
releases.description:
## Bug fix

**Pull from Notion: quote blocks inside list items no longer show as blockquotes in Obsidian.**

Notion stores indented text under bullet points as `quote` blocks. Previously these were converted to `>` markdown blockquotes, which Obsidian renders with a prominent left border — looking nothing like the original Notion layout. Now such blocks render as plain indented text, matching Notion's visual appearance.
releases.name: 1.1.1 — Fix pull formatting

releases.author: sharkello
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.1.0

### Sync Panel (left ribbon icon)
- Click the **upload-cloud** icon in the left ribbon to open the Notion Sync side panel
- Toolbar buttons mirroring VS Code's Source Control panel:
  - **Push** group: Sync Entire Vault, Sync Changed Files, Sync Current Note
  - **Pull** group: Pull All Notes ← Notion, Pull Current Note ← Notion
  - Log button: Open Sync Log

### Bidirectional sync (Pull from Notion)
- Pull individual note or all mapped notes back from Notion to Obsidian
- Smart conflict detection: if both local file and Notion page changed since last sync, the file is **not** overwritten — you get a warning to resolve manually
- New commands: `Pull current note from Notion`, `Pull all notes from Notion`

### Bug fix
- **Fixed**: switching sync mode to Manual no longer leaves the OnSave file watcher active (files were syncing automatically even in Manual mode)
releases.name: 1.1.0 — Sync Panel & Bidirectional Pull

releases.author: sharkello
releases.description:
Initial release of Notion Sync for Obsidian.

Sync your vault with Notion — preserves folder hierarchy, markdown formatting, internal links, frontmatter metadata, and attachments.
